summary: Soundboard recording of an electric June 1991 show where the Dead were on fire, featuring solid sound and standout energy from Jerry and Vince.
review: The reviewers rave about the band’s fire‑brand performance – lights, fans and “Jerry spitting” notes – and note that the sound was finally “down” during this period of the tour. The SBD source delivers clear, well‑balanced audio with no reported flaws, making it a worthy candidate for a Dick’s Picks or box‑set release.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed, enthusiastic reviews highlight an excellent performance and good soundboard quality; the third review is non‑informative, so rating reflects strong show with solid recording but limited data points.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers say the band’s sound was “down” and Jerry sounded good, indicating a clear, well‑balanced mix without noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy performance with intense lighting and fan interaction; the band felt on fire throughout the set.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as “spitting” notes and sounding good at this time.
band_member_comments.Bob: Mentioned as getting into it on stage, contributing to the show’s energy.
band_member_comments.Keys: Vince (keys) noted as coming along great during this period.
